name: What if my work illness happened over years with no single incident in West Valley?
description: Yes as occupational disease; prove work cause.[2]

mainEntity.name: What if my work illness happened over years with no single incident in West Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes as occupational disease; prove work cause.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Cumulative trauma/occupational diseases covered if predominant work cause.[2] No 'accident' needed.[1] Key factors: Exposure duration, medical causation. Document job tasks; specialist report essential.
